data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for granting permissions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to grant permissions at various levels, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the actual implementation of these permissions. The linked use case mentions the need for scoped permissions, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied or identifying any gaps. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of permission grants at biz, location, or scoped subject level.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the permission granting requirement.
